{"query":"Jodie Foster return True Detective season 5 interview anthology one and done 2025","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1733,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://variety.com/2024/tv/news/jodie-foster-true-detective-season-5-not-returning-1235921536/","title":"Jodie Foster in 'True Detective' Season 5? Actor Will Not Return","content":"Now that “True Detective” is renewed for a fifth season and “Night Country” creator Issa López is returning to oversee it, many fans are wondering if the HBO series will continue to go the anthology route or possibly feature the return of “Night Country” characters played by Jodi Foster and Kali Reis.
Foster weighed in on a possible return while speaking to Variety On the Carpet presented by DIRECTV at the 2024 Oscars.
More controversy was generated after the “Night Country” finale aired.
See more of the looks from the Oscars red carpet here."},{"url":"https://www.today.com/popculture/tv/true-detective-season-5-rcna139252","title":"'True Detective' Season 5 Renewed: All the Details","content":"Premiering in January, the latest installment in the HBO anthology series follows Liz Danvers and Evangeline Navarro, two Alaska cops (played by Jodie Foster and Kali Reis), who investigate a group of researchers discovered frozen together in a formation dubbed a "corpsicle."
TODAY.com talked to HBO, as well as Foster and Reis about a potential return.
Regarding her return, HBO writes, "Issa Lopez is that one-of-a-kind, rare talent that speaks directly to HBO’s creative spirit.
Those, and other burning questions, will likely remain unanswered.
Sarah Lemire is a lifestyle and entertainment reporter for TODAY based in New York City."},{"url":"https://www.tvguide.com/news/true-detective-season-5-renewal-news-whos-coming-back-and-more/","title":"True Detective Season 5: Renewal News, Who's Coming Back, and More - TV Guide","content":"Scroll down for everything there is to know about True Detective Season 5, like who is and is not returning for the next season and how long it might be before we get to watch it.
Speaking with Deadline, HBO's drama chief Francesca Orsi made a few interesting comments about the upcoming season of True Detective, most notably that showrunner Issa Lopez has chosen where it will take place: Jamaica Bay, in New York, an inlet and wildlife refuge to the south of Brooklyn and Queens, adjacent to the JFK airport.
However, Season 4 creator, director, and writer Issa López is definitely coming back.
And that is not changing any time soon, because HBO's drama head Francesca Orsi told Deadline that they're aiming for a 2027 launch for True Detective Season 5."},{"url":"https://www.hollywoodreporter.com/tv/tv-news/true-detective-season-5-issa-lopez-1235832894/","title":"True Detective Renewed for Season 5; Issa Lopez Back as Showrunner","content":"Discovery-owned cabler and will return to steer the fifth season after taking over the franchise from creator Nic Pizzolatto.
She helmed True Detective: Night Country from start to finish, never once faltering from her own commendable vision, and inspiring us with her resilience both on the page and behind the camera,” HBO’s head of drama Francesca Orsi said in a statement.
López, in multiple interviews, has said that she loved Pizzolatto’s seasons of the franchise and set out to make a show set in the same universe."},{"url":"https://uproxx.com/tv/will-jodie-foster-be-in-true-detective-season-5/","title":"Will Jodie Foster Return For 'True Detective' Season 5?","content":"The Oscar-winning actress starred in season four of the anthology series, which followed Foster and Kali Reis as two detectives taking on one chilling case in Alaska (really it was Iceland, but it does look similar).
While the series has been renewed for a fifth season, Foster says that she’s not involved.
Foster also made it clear that she didn’t see any of the hate from Nic Pizzolatto because she’s not on social media."}]}
